message:
fix(search): remove dead CandidateStageCounts code, add backtick_snippets parser

search_candidates.rs:
- Remove the dead CandidateStageCounts construction block that computed
  lexical_considered, semantic_considered, deduped_selected, and
  duplicates_removed but was never stored or returned — the
  CandidateBudgetDerivation struct only carries (budget, decision).
- Apply rustfmt formatting fixes to .clamp() chains for consistency.

search.rs (tools):
- Add backtick_snippets() helper that extracts inline code spans from a
  line by matching paired backtick delimiters, returning a Vec of the
  content slices between each balanced pair. Empty backtick pairs (``)
  are skipped. This supports downstream action-item extraction that
  needs to distinguish code references from prose.
- Fix rustfmt line-length split in the FIXME/TODO/ACTION keyword check
  within summarize_messages().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
